name: Statistics

states.name: Page Structure
states.description: Core structural elements of the Statistics page including heading, summary metric cards, and status breakdown section.

states.name: Metrics State
states.description: State consistency of metric values and table structure on the statistics dashboard.
states.precondition: Page has loaded with statistics data available

states.name: Page Purpose
states.description: The Statistics page provides performance analytics for workflow executions. It displays summary metrics (total runs, average duration, success rate, total time), a status breakdown with visual distribution bars, and a recent runs table comparing each run's duration against the average. A performance view adds time-range filtering and detailed metric cards.

description: Statistics page — execution performance analytics and metrics dashboard
